documentation.file_docstring: Homebrew Cellar paths (e.g. /opt/homebrew/Cellar/node/25.7.0/bin/node) break when Homebrew upgrades Node and removes the old version directory. Resolve these to a stable Homebrew-managed path that survives upgrades: - Default formula "node":  <prefix>/opt/node/bin/node  or  <prefix>/bin/node - Versioned formula "node@22":  <prefix>/opt/node@22/bin/node  (keg-only)
inline_comments: Try the Homebrew opt symlink first — works for both default and versioned formulas.
For the default "node" formula, also try the direct bin symlink.

functions.name: resolveStableNodePath
